description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits a lobed margin with prominent venation. Surface appears slightly pubescent. Overall leaf shape is broadly ovate."} {"description": "Multiple chlorotic lesions are present. Lesions are generally small to medium in size (approximately 2-8mm diameter). Lesions appear somewhat irregular in shape, with slightly raised or blister-like appearance in some areas. Some lesions exhibit a necrotic center."} Lesions are distributed across the leaf surface, with a higher concentration along the veins and margins. Distribution appears somewhat random, but with a tendency to follow vein patterns. Both adaxial and abaxial surfaces likely affected (based on lesion appearance).
